ogTitle: Lenaghan vs Lennox Head: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lenaghan and Lennox Head.
heading: Lenaghan vs Lennox Head — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lenaghan, New South Wales and Lennox Head, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lenaghan has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Lennox Head (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lenaghan or Lennox Head safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lenaghan has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Lennox Head scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lenaghan scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Lennox Head scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lenaghan or Lennox Head?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lenaghan has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
